description: review-pr does NOT compute a weighted 0-10 composite — its verdict is severity-bucket driven (critical|high|medium|low|info findings per category, deduplicated by file+line+category). This rubric maps the 6 finding categories to dimensions and encodes severity buckets as score bands: any CRITICAL finding in a dimension lands it in the 0-3 band, below min_blocker 4.0 -> hard blocker -> request-changes verdict. Weights reflect severity-sorting/reporting emphasis (security findings shown first), not a composite gate — hence no composite.min_pass.
source: rules/agent-prompts-task-tool.md (structured output contract: severity + category buckets), SKILL.md Phase 5/6 (approve | comment | request-changes verdict)

dimensions.name: security
dimensions.description: SEC findings from security-auditor: secrets, injection, auth flaws.

bands.label: critical
bands.description: At least one CRITICAL finding — blocks merge (request-changes)

bands.label: high
bands.description: HIGH findings present, no critical — request-changes or comment per synthesis

bands.label: low
bands.description: Worst finding is LOW/info — nitpicks and suggestions

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.description: BUG findings from code-quality reviewers: logic errors, broken paths, regressions.

bands.label: critical
bands.description: At least one CRITICAL finding — blocks merge (request-changes)

dimensions.name: testing
dimensions.description: TEST findings from test-generator: coverage gaps, missing edge cases.

bands.label: critical
bands.description: At least one CRITICAL finding — blocks merge (request-changes)

dimensions.name: maintainability
dimensions.description: MAINT findings from code-quality reviewers: readability, complexity, DRY, type safety.

bands.label: critical
bands.description: At least one CRITICAL finding — blocks merge (request-changes)

dimensions.name: performance
dimensions.description: PERF findings from backend-system-architect: N+1, async misuse, transaction issues.

bands.label: critical
bands.description: At least one CRITICAL finding — blocks merge (request-changes)

dimensions.name: accessibility
dimensions.description: A11Y findings from frontend-ui-developer: WCAG, hooks, React 19 patterns. Dimension only active when the frontend domain is detected in the diff.

bands.label: critical
bands.description: At least one CRITICAL finding — blocks merge (request-changes)
